info.title: Life Navigator API
info.description: Production-grade AI life management platform backend with comprehensive APIs for users, goals, health, finance, career, education, and AI agents powered by Maverick LLM

get.description: List all goals for current user

schema.title: Response List Goals Api V1 Goals  Get
Response List Health Records Api V1 Health Records Get
Response List Medications Api V1 Health Medications Get
Response List Providers Api V1 Health Providers Get

Response List Transactions Api V1 Finance Transactions Get
Response List Investments Api V1 Finance Investments Get
Response List Experiences Api V1 Career Experiences Get
Response List Skills Api V1 Career Skills Get
Response List Education Records Api V1 Education Records Get
Response List Courses Api V1 Education Courses Get
Response List Certifications Api V1 Education Certifications Get

get.description: List all agents for the current user

schema.title: Response List Agents Api V1 Agents  Get

post.description: Execute a task with the specified agent

schema.title: Response List Tasks Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Tasks Get

post.description: Chat with an agent using Maverick LLM

schema.title: Response List Conversations Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Conversations Get
